metadata.description: RaV Town — Multi-agent orchestration for autonomous feature development from PRDs

plugins.name: rav-town
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration system for autonomous feature development. Includes PRD generation, story-by-story implementation loops, git worktree isolation, and fleet management.

plugins.name: dev-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation with persistent page state via Playwright. Navigate websites, fill forms, take screenshots, extract web data, test web apps, and automate browser workflows.

plugins.name: worktree-devcontainer
plugins.description: Isolated development environments for AI sub-agents. Git worktree lifecycle management and dev container orchestration for running work in isolated branches and containerized environments.

plugins.name: ravagents
plugins.description: 18 specialized engineering agents covering the full software development lifecycle — feature development, testing, security, threat modeling, DevOps, infrastructure, observability, code review, architecture governance, documentation, product spec, UX, roadmap planning, migration, performance optimization, and data validation.
